name: Fiesta Rib Eye Steaks
recipeIngredient: 4 Rib eye steaks; or top loin
1 cup La Victoria Salsa; or homemade (NO PACE!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place steaks in a utility dish and sprinkle with half the lime juice.
2. Turn steaks over and sprinkle with the remaining lime juice.
3. Wrap tortillas securely in heavy-duty aluminum foil.
4. Place steaks on grid over medium coals.
5. Grill steaks 7 to 9 minutes for rare (140°F) to medium (160°F), turning once.
6. Place tortilla packet on outer edge of grid and heat 5 minutes, turning once.
7. Top each steak with an equal amount of the cheeses.
8. Serve with salsa and the tortillas.
